Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Statement Of Damages; Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
J. Julia Hansen, Esq., for Defendant & moving party: Sequoia Med. Associates, Inc.
No other appearance.
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Sequoia Medical Associates, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Statement Of Damages; Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further to the special interrogatories, to respond to the request for statement of damages, and to verify the responses within 15 days of notice of this order. The court finds that the responses to the special interrogatories and the opposition to the motion as to the special interrogatories was without substantial justification. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $800, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
